'''Quinn Sheffield''' was a [[Baron/Legends|Baron]] of [[House Reena/Legends|House Reena]]. He represented his house in the [[Vor-cal]] on at least seven occasions. He was, however, not a very good hunter and participated because it gave him an opportunity to socialize and escape from the rigors of bureaucratic life. Although only a Baron, it was suspected that Quinn was a key house advisor.<ref name="LOTE" />
